title: Canonical Format: Sponsored Placement (retail-media catalog-driven)
description: Catalog-driven retail-media format. Slot: `source_catalog` (catalog asset — product/SKU/ASIN/GTIN catalog reference), optional `landing_page_url`. Buyer supplies the catalog reference; surface composes per-item or multi-item rendering using its native placement template. **Composition is deterministic** — buyer can predict per-slot rendering from the catalog item structure. Tracking model: per-item impression + click + conversion (catalog-keyed via offering_id/sku/gtin macros). Covers Amazon Sponsored Products, Criteo Sponsored Products, CitrusAd Sponsored Products. Distinct from `asset_pool_composed` (algorithmic combinator from buyer pool) and `brand_mention` (text/audio AI-surface composition).

min_items.description: Minimum catalog item count buyer must supply.

fanout_mode.description: How items map to delivery: per_item = one ad per catalog item; multi_item_in_creative = composed multi-item ad (Pinterest Collection, Snap Collection); single_item = one ad showing one item.

required_catalog_fields.description: Catalog item fields the seller requires (e.g., ['title', 'image_url', 'price']).

supported_id_types.description: Catalog identifier types the placement renders against.

hero_asset_supported.description: Whether the buyer can supply a hero/banner asset alongside the catalog (Pinterest Collection pattern).
